ucs.title: [LLM] LockBit (BITWISE SPIDER) pre-encryption inhibit-recovery command chain
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical LockBit 2.0/3.0/Black command sequence run seconds before mass encryption: vssadmin/wmic shadow copy deletion, bcdedit boot-recovery tampering, wbadmin catalog wipe, and wevtutil log clear. CISA/Microsoft (Storm-0506/BITWISE SPIDER) report this same fingerprint across LockBit affiliates regardless of payload variant.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as first_time max(_time) as last_time values(Processes.process) as commandlines values(Processes.process_name) as binaries values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents dc(Processes.process_name) as distinct_inhibitors from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","wbadmin.exe","wevtutil.exe","fsutil.exe")) AND (Processes.process="*delete shadows*" OR Processes.process="*shadowcopy delete*" OR Processes.process="*recoveryenabled no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*" OR Processes.process="*delete catalog*" OR Processes.process="*wevtutil*cl *" OR Processes.process="*usn deletejournal*") by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=10m
| where distinct_inhibitors >= 2
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| sort 0 - first_time
ucs.kql:
let LookbackHours = 24h;
let WindowMin = 10m;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackHours)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"   // exclude machine accounts
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
     or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe"     and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
     or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
     or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe"  and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
     or (FileName =~ "wevtutil.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has " cl ")
     or (FileName =~ "fsutil.exe"   and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("usn","deletejournal"))
| summarize InhibitorCount = dcount(FileName),
            Inhibitors    = make_set(FileName),
            Commands      = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 8),
            FirstSeen     = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen      = max(Timestamp),
            Parents       = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 5),
            ParentCmds    = make_set(InitiatingProcessCommandLine, 5)
          by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, WindowMin)
| where InhibitorCount >= 2   // 2+ distinct recovery-inhibitor binaries within 10 min = LockBit signature
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let WindowMin = 10m;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wmic.exe"     and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"  and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wbadmin.exe"  and CommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"))
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\wevtutil.exe" and CommandLine has " cl ")
     or (NewProcessName endswith "\\fsutil.exe"   and CommandLine has_all ("usn","deletejournal"))
| summarize InhibitorCount = dcount(NewProcessName),
            Inhibitors    = make_set(NewProcessName),
            Commands      = make_set(CommandLine, 8),
            FirstSeen     = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen      = max(TimeGenerated),
            Parents       = make_set(ParentProcessName, 5)
          by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, WindowMin)
| where InhibitorCount >= 2
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: LockBit Pre-Encryption Inhibit-Recovery Command Chain
status: stable
description: Detects the LockBit (BITWISE SPIDER) signature pre-encryption sequence — shadow copy deletion + boot-recovery tampering + backup catalog wipe + event log clear, run within minutes of each other on the same host.
references:
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-165a
  - https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/category/threat-intelligence/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_vss:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  selection_wmic:
    Image|endswith: '\wmic.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'shadowcopy'
      - 'delete'
  selection_bcdedit:
    Image|endswith: '\bcdedit.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'recoveryenabled no'
      - 'bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures'
  selection_wbadmin:
    Image|endswith: '\wbadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'catalog'
  selection_wevtutil:
    Image|endswith: '\wevtutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains: ' cl '
  selection_fsutil:
    Image|endswith: '\fsutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'usn'
      - 'deletejournal'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: 1 of selection_* and not filter_machine_account
fields:
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
  - User
  - Computer
falsepositives:
  - Authorised backup-server lifecycle scripts (rare; should be allowlisted by host)
  - Disaster-recovery testing
level: high
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.t1070.004
  - attack.g0102
ucs.rationale: LockBit's encryptor (and its lockbit3.exe / LockBit Black variant analyzed by CISA AA23-165A and Microsoft Threat Intelligence on Storm-0506/BITWISE SPIDER) hard-codes this exact recovery-inhibition sequence into its native code path before the file-encryption thread starts. While Conti, BlackCat, Akira and others overlap on individual commands, LockBit is one of the very few families that fires 4

ucs.title: [LLM] LockBit affiliate Rclone-to-MEGA / StealBit double-extortion exfiltration
ucs.description: Hunts LockBit's signature pre-encryption staging: Rclone configured with a 'mega:' remote (or LockBit's purpose-built StealBit exfiltrator). NCC Group, Kroll, and Microsoft incident response have flagged Rclone-to-MEGA and StealBit as the dominant double-extortion data-theft tooling for LockBit 2.0/3.0/Green/5.0 affiliates.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as first_time max(_time) as last_time values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_hash) as hash from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="rclone.exe" OR Processes.process="*rclone*" OR Processes.process_name="stealbit.exe" OR Processes.process="*StealBit*" OR Processes.original_file_name="rclone*") AND (Processes.process="*mega:*" OR Processes.process="*megacmd*" OR Processes.process="* --config *" OR Processes.process="*--multi-thread-streams*" OR Processes.process="*--no-check-certificate*" OR Processes.process="*--ignore-existing*" OR Processes.process="*:remote*" OR Processes.process="*--transfers *") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name
| where NOT match(user, "(?i)\$$")
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| sort 0 - first_time
ucs.kql:
// LockBit double-extortion exfil tooling — Rclone with cloud-storage args OR StealBit indicators
let Lookback = 7d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where
    // Rclone — by name, internal name, or commandline (renamed binaries are common)
    ( (FileName =~ "rclone.exe"
       or ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName =~ "rclone.exe"
       or ProcessVersionInfoProductName has "rclone"
       or ProcessCommandLine has " rclone ")
      and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("mega:","megacmd",":remote"," --config ","--multi-thread-streams","--no-check-certificate","--ignore-existing","--transfers "," copy "," sync ") )
  or
    // StealBit — LockBit's bespoke exfil tool (LockBit 2.0/3.0)
    ( FileName has "stealbit"
      or ProcessVersionInfoOriginalFileName has "stealbit"
      or ProcessCommandLine has "StealBit" )
| extend Indicator = case(
    FileName has "stealbit" or ProcessCommandLine has "StealBit", "StealBit",
    ProcessCommandLine has "mega:" or ProcessCommandLine has "megacmd", "Rclone-to-MEGA",
    "Rclone-cloud-egress")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, Indicator,
          FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
          ProcessCommandLine,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessTokenElevation
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let Lookback = 7d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| where ( (NewProcessName endswith "\\rclone.exe"
           or CommandLine has " rclone "
           or CommandLine has_any ("mega:","megacmd",":remote"," --config ","--multi-thread-streams","--no-check-certificate","--ignore-existing"," --transfers "))
          and CommandLine has_any ("mega:","megacmd",":remote"," --config ","--multi-thread-streams","--no-check-certificate","--ignore-existing"," copy "," sync ") )
     or NewProcessName has "stealbit"
     or CommandLine has "StealBit"
| extend Indicator = case(
    NewProcessName has "stealbit" or CommandLine has "StealBit", "StealBit",
    CommandLine has "mega:" or CommandLine has "megacmd", "Rclone-to-MEGA",
    "Rclone-cloud-egress")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, Indicator,
          NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: LockBit Affiliate Data Exfiltration via Rclone-to-MEGA or StealBit
status: stable
description: Detects LockBit double-extortion staging — Rclone invoked with cloud-storage arguments (especially the 'mega:' remote favoured by LockBit affiliates) or LockBit's bespoke StealBit exfil binary.
references:
  - https://www.ncsc.gov.uk/files/Advisory_Understanding_Ransomware_Threat_Actors_LockBit.pdf
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-165a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_rclone_image:
    - Image|endswith: '\rclone.exe'
    - OriginalFileName: 'rclone.exe'
  selection_rclone_cloud_args:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'mega:'
      - 'megacmd'
      - ':remote'
      - '--multi-thread-streams'
      - '--no-check-certificate'
      - '--ignore-existing'
      - ' --transfers '
      - ' --config '
  selection_stealbit:
    - Image|contains: 'stealbit'
    - OriginalFileName|contains: 'stealbit'
    - CommandLine|contains: 'StealBit'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: ((selection_rclone_image and selection_rclone_cloud_args) or selection_stealbit) and not filter_machine_account
fields:
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
  - User
  - Computer
  - Hashes
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned IT use of Rclone for backup to MEGA / B2 / S3 (rare in enterprise; allowlist by host or signing cert)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.exfiltration
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.t1219
  - attack.g0102
ucs.rationale: LockBit affiliates standardised on Rclone-to-MEGA (and the LockBit-owned StealBit utility) as their pre-encryption data-theft tools — see CISA AA23-165A, NCSC LockBit advisory, and Kroll/NCC Group LockBit IR retrospectives. Other RaaS crews use other exfil tools (BlackCat → ExMatter, Cl0p → Megazord), so the combination of 'rclone with mega: remote' OR 'StealBit binary metadata' is uncommon outsid
